DynamicPermission.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor');
SELECT 'ITSMInovationSharedReporter' AS PermissionIdent FROM usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView as itsmFolTre WHERE itsmFolTre.FolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCompanyIdent AND itsmFolTre.IsShareAmongAuthors = @StateOne AND EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(@UserID, @FolderGroupSegmentIdent, @PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = itsmFolTre.FolderTreeIdent )

DataSource.SQL:
DECLARE @NewITSMInovation_Title_ITSM NVARCHAR(255) = usr.GetResourceText('NewITSMInovation_Title_ITSM', @UserLanguageID)
SELECT ISNULL(CAST(( SELECT CONCAT([ITSMKey] , ' ' , LEFT(itsReq.Subject, 20)) FROM usr.ITSMInovation AS itsReq WHERE itsReq.ID = @ID ) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)), @NewITSMInovation_Title_ITSM) AS Title

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMImplementationChangeProposalDecision AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMImplementationChangeProposalDecisionSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMImplementationChangeProposalDecision AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMImplementationChangeProposalDecisionSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT ID , FullName FROM dbo.Account WHERE [State] = @ActiveState ORDER BY FullName ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = STUFF(( SELECT CONCAT(', ', acc.FullName) FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE ( @Value LIKE CAST(acc.ID AS VARCHAR(255)) -- Jediná hodnota v listu OR @Value LIKE CAST(acc.ID AS VARCHAR(255))+',%' -- List začínající hodnotou OR @Value LIKE '%,'+CAST(acc.ID AS VARCHAR(255))+',%' -- Hodnota uprostřed listu OR @Value LIKE '%,'+CAST(acc.ID AS VARCHAR(255)) -- List končící hodnotou ) FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)'), 1, 2, '')

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMSpecialist'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT itsm.SourceID AS ID ,CONCAT(itsm.[ITSMKey],' - ',itsm.[Subject]) AS [ITSMTitle] FROM usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsm WHERE ( itsm.[ITSMKey] LIKE @ITSMChangeID OR itsm.[Subject] LIKE @ITSMChangeID ) AND itsm.SourceID != ISNULL(@ID, -1) AND itsm.SourceFormIdent = @ChangeFormIdent AND itsm.LastFolderTreeIdent IN ( SELECT FolderTreeIdent FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,@PermissionIDs) )

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT itsm.SourceID AS ID ,CONCAT(itsm.[ITSMKey],' - ',itsm.[Subject]) AS [ITSMTitle] FROM usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsm WHERE itsm.SourceID = @ITSMChangeID AND itsm.SourceFormIdent = @ChangeFormIdent
SELECT gro.ID ,gro.[Name] FROM dbo.[Group] AS gro WHERE gro.ID = @AssignedGroupID
SELECT gro.ID ,gro.[Name] FROM dbo.[Group] AS gro WHERE gro.ID = @DialogAssignedGroupID
SELECT gro.ID ,gro.[Name] FROM dbo.[Group] AS gro WHERE gro.ID = @DialogAssignedToMyGroupID

DefaultDataSource.SQL: SELECT gro.ID AS AssignedGroupID FROM dbo.[Group] AS gro INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gra ON gra.GroupID = gro.ID AND gra.AccountID = @UserID WHERE gro.ID = @AssignedGroupID

EmptyDataBind.SQL: SELECT TOP(20) acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE gas.GroupID = @AssignedGroupID AND acc.[State] = @AccountActiveState

DataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE acc.FullName LIKE @AssignedAccountID AND gas.GroupID = @AssignedGroupID AND acc.[State] = @AccountActiveState

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @AssignedAccountID

DefaultDependencyDataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE acc.ID = @AssignedAccountID AND gas.GroupID = @AssignedGroupID AND acc.[State] = @AccountActiveState

EmptyDataBind.SQL: SELECT TOP(20) acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE gas.GroupID = @DialogAssignedGroupID AND acc.[State] = @AccountActiveState

DataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE acc.FullName LIKE @DialogAssignedAccountID AND gas.GroupID = @DialogAssignedGroupID AND acc.[State] = @AccountActiveState

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @DialogAssignedAccountID

DefaultDependencyDataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE acc.ID = @DialogAssignedAccountID AND gas.GroupID = @DialogAssignedGroupID AND acc.[State] = @AccountActiveState

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor');
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident , itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(ISNULL(@AccountID,@UserID),@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.FolderName LIKE @ITSMCompanyIdent

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT fot.Ident , fol.[Name] FROM dbo.Folder AS fol INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fot ON fot.FolderID = fol.ID WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCompanyIdent

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor');
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident , itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(ISNULL(@AccountID,@UserID),@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCompanyIdent

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor');
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident , itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(ISNULL(@AccountID,@UserID),@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor');
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident , itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(ISNULL(@AccountID,@UserID),@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor');
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident , itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(ISNULL(@AccountID,@UserID),@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor');
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(ISNULL(@AccountID,@UserID),@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderLevel = @Level AND ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident ) , 1 , 0 ) AS IsShowCategoryLevel5

SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

SELECT dialsetting.Guid ,dial.TextValue ,IIF(dialsetting.Guid = @ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid, 1, 0) AS Selected FROM usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC
SELECT @SolutionDescription AS SolutionDescription
SELECT @SolutionAditionalInformation AS SolutionAditionalInformation

DataSource.SQL:
SELECT ISNULL(itsReq.[State], 1) AS [State] ,itsGrmt.[TextValue] AS ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid
,itsReq.ID ,itsReq.ITSMKey ,itsReq.Subject
,itsReqParent.ID AS ParentTableID ,itsReqParent.ITSMKey AS ParentITSMKey ,itsReqParent.Subject AS ParentSubject
,accCreator.FullName AS AccountID ,itsReq.CreateDate
,accLastUpdate.FullName AS LastUpdateAccountID ,itsReq.LastUpdate
,groAssigned.[Name] AS AssignedGroupID ,accAssigned.[FullName] AS AssignedAccountID
FROM (VALUES (0)) AS dual(zero) LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMInovation AS itsReq ON itsReq.ID = @ID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMInovation AS itsReqParent ON itsReqParent.ID = itsReq.ParentTableID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS groAssigned ON groAssigned.ID = itsReq.AssignedGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accAssigned ON accAssigned.ID = itsReq.AssignedAccountID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accCreator ON accCreator.ID = ISNULL(itsReq.AccountID, @UserID) LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accLastUpdate ON accLastUpdate.ID = itsReq.LastUpdateAccountID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodType AS itsGrmt ON itsGrmt.Guid = itsReq.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid AND itsGrmt.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID

SELECT CONCAT(itsGsc.SLAType, '_SLAType_ITSM') AS SLAType ,CONCAT(itsGsc.SLAStatus, '_SLAType_ITSM') AS SLAStatus ,itsGsc.FinishTime AS SLADate ,itsGsc.TimeSpent AS SLASpentTime ,itsGsc.PercentSpent AS SLASpentPercent ,itsGsc.TimeRemain AS SLARemainingTime ,itsGsc.PercentRemain AS SLARemainingPercent ,itsGsc.SLAName AS CalendarName ,CONCAT('bg-', itsGsc.SLAStatusColorCssClass) AS SLAStatusColorCssClass FROM usr.ITSMInovation AS itsReq CROSS APPLY usr.ITSM_GetSLAComputes (itsReq.ID, 'ITSMInovation', NULL) AS itsGsc WHERE itsReq.ID = @ID ORDER BY itsGsc.SLATypePriority

DataBind.SQL: SELECT( SELECT mus.[Value] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN usr.ITSMCategory AS itsCat ON itsCat.ID = fol.TableID INNER JOIN usr.ITSMOptionalField AS itsOpfSetting ON itsOpfSetting.ID = itsCat.ITSMOptionalFieldID INNER JOIN dbo.MultiSelect AS mus ON mus.TableID = itsOpfSetting.ID AND mus.FormIdent = 'ITSMOptionalField' AND ControlIdent = 'OptionalFieldIdent' WHERE fot.Ident = ISNULL(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident) FOR JSON PATH ) AS AdditionalFieldVisibility
SELECT ID, FullName FROM dbo.Account WHERE FullName LIKE @ReporterAccountID AND [State] = @ActiveState

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT ID, FullName FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID

DataBind.SQL: SELECT Email AS ReporterEmail FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID
SELECT IIF( ISNULL(( SELECT Email FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID ), '') != ISNULL(@ReporterEmail, '') ,1,0) AS IsReporterEmailDifferent
SELECT Phone AS ReporterPhone FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID
SELECT IIF( ISNULL(( SELECT Phone FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID ), '') != ISNULL(@ReporterPhone, '') ,1,0) AS IsReporterPhoneDifferent

SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

DefaultDataSource.SQL: SELECT [GUID] AS ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting WHERE FunctionalKey = 'user' AND [State] != @DeletedState

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

OtherSource.SQL: SELECT c.ID FROM dbo.Communication as c WHERE c.TableID = @ID AND c.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND c.ControlIdent = @ControlIdent

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMSpecialist'), ('ITSMOperator'), ('ITSMAuthor');
SELECT itsm.SourceID AS ID ,CONCAT(itsm.ITSMKey,' - ',itsm.[Subject]) AS [ITSMTitle] FROM usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsm WHERE ( itsm.ITSMKey LIKE @ParentTableID OR itsm.[Subject] LIKE @ParentTableID ) AND itsm.SourceID != ISNULL(@ID, -1) AND itsm.SourceFormIdent = @SourceFormIdent AND itsm.LastFolderTreeIdent IN ( SELECT FolderTreeIdent FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(@UserID, @FolderGroupSegmentIdent, @PermissionIDs) )

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT itsm.SourceID AS ID ,CONCAT(itsm.ITSMKey,' - ',itsm.[Subject]) AS [ITSMTitle] FROM usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsm WHERE itsm.SourceID = @ParentTableID AND itsm.SourceFormIdent = @SourceFormIdent

DataSource.SQL: DECLARE @ThisID_ITSM VARCHAR(255) = usr.GetResourceText('ThisID_ITSM', @UserLanguageID); SELECT itsmLinSbf.ID ,itsmLit.TextValue AS ITSMLinkTypeGuid ,IIF(itsmS.UniqueSourceIdent = CONCAT(@ID, '#', @ThisFormIdent), usr.GetResourceText('ThisRecord_ITSM', @UserLanguageID), CONCAT('', itsmS.[ITSMKey], '') ) AS SourceUniqueIdent ,IIF(itsmT.UniqueSourceIdent = CONCAT(@ID, '#', @ThisFormIdent), usr.GetResourceText('ThisRecord_ITSM', @UserLanguageID), CONCAT('', itsmT.[ITSMKey], '') ) AS TargetUniqueIdent FROM usr.ITSMLinkSubForm AS itsmLinSbf INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsmS ON itsmS.UniqueSourceIdent = itsmLinSbf.SourceUniqueIdent INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsmT ON itsmT.UniqueSourceIdent = itsmLinSbf.TargetUniqueIdent INNER JOIN usr.ITSMLinkType AS itsmLit ON itsmLit.Guid = itsmLinSbf.ITSMLinkTypeGuid AND itsmLit.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID WHERE itsmLinSbf.[State] != @DeletedState AND (itsmLinSbf.SourceUniqueIdent = CONCAT(@ID, '#', @ThisFormIdent) OR itsmLinSbf.TargetUniqueIdent = CONCAT(@ID, '#', @ThisFormIdent)) AND itsmLinSbf.FormIdent = @FormIdent

DECLARE @Group_ITSM VARCHAR(255) = usr.GetResourceText('Group_ITSM', @UserLanguageID);
SELECT itsmFfv.SourceID ,'ITSMInovation' AS FormIdent ,itsmFfv.ITSMKey ,itsmFfv.[Subject] ,fol.[Name] AS LastFolderTreeIdent FROM usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsmFfv INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fot ON fot.Ident = itsmFfv.LastFolderTreeIdent INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID WHERE itsmFfv.ParentTableID = @ID AND itsmFfv.SourceFormIdent = 'ITSMInovation' AND #PERMISSION[ITSMInovation(itsmFfv)]#

Section.HTMLTemplate:
[#BasicInformation_ITSM#]
[#IdeaForInnovation_ITSM#]
[#Communication_ITSM#]
[#ReporterInformation_ITSM#]
[#ReporterEmailDifferent_Information_ITSM#]
[#ReporterPhoneDifferent_Information_ITSM#]
[#RequestControl_ITSM#]
[#Solution_ITSM#]
[#ImplementationOfChange_ITSM#]
*

[#ITSMLinkSubForm_ITSM#]
[#ITSMStructure_ITSM#]
